creator: scheidell@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Thank you for yor work on audio/audacity-devel. Since you are not the maintainer of audio/audacity, craig@yekse.gank.org is.  
Please coorinate this with Craig. At the very least, open two new pr's. one, subject: [PATCH] update audio/audacity to 2.0,  
(which will be forwarded to craig for his approval), second one, request that audio/audacity-devel be deleted. 
(if craig has given up maintaining audio/audacity, please have him email ports@freebsd.org to reset maintainer) 

In your patch, please just include what is needed against audio/audacity (not audio/audacity-new or -devel) 
Examples of red flags in patches: 

-# New ports collection makefile for:	audacity 
-# Date created:				21 Jul 2001 
-# Whom:					Marc van Woerkom <3d@freebsd.org> 
+# New ports collection makefile for:	audacity-devel 
+# Date created:				14 Sep 2006 
+# Whom:					Jackson Low <xxjack12xx@gmail.com> 
# 
-# $FreeBSD: ports/audio/audacity/Makefile,v 1.43 2011/09/23 22:20:56 amdmi3 Exp $ 
+# $FreeBSD: ports/audio/audacity-devel/Makefile,v 1.58 2012/02/25 22:12:25 eadler Exp $ 

Don't include ANY of this in the update of audacity to 2.0. 
cvs history needs to be preserved, including the original Makefile v 1.43 
(this is different than when you requested a repocopy from audacity -> audacity-devel) 

Again, this pr needs to be a straight [PATCH] update audio/audacity to 2.0 
Any questions, feel free to join and post to freebsd-ports@ group.
